name: No, I'm Not A Human
description:
"They are... Burning!"

This is the serious no im not a human RPG, i couldnt waste all those tokens for the parody one lol.

Game's freshly new, there are basically not RPG of it, will my bot become the most popular one? Usually when something new comes out the first bots about it are bound to break all their limits cause theres not really much to use. Ima jiggle my diggle if this blows up (if the AI doesnt fuck up everything)

New thing added: Make your own scenario greeting! Its simple really, you just create whatever story you want yourself, aint that cool?

Also check out the Visitor and Guest POV i did!

Remember to join my server pookies https://discord.gg/BR793CK3AH
creator: GreedyJuro
